truthAudit.Summary: Audit of Run 2 findings against ground truth. 7 of 20 true vulnerabilities were identified. 13 were missed. 2 findings in Run 2 were false positives or unsupported by ground truth. Several severity and CWE classifications require correction.

Items.Notes: Previous answer correctly identified format string injection in log_debug_message with matching evidence.
Integer overflow in factorial computation was not mentioned in the previous answer.
Use-after-free in memory-pool cleanup was not mentioned in the previous answer.

Items.Key: stack buffer overflow via logic error in evaluate_expression|buffer overflow|cwe-120|critical|0.95|enhanced_calc.cpp|831|834|calculator::supercalc::evaluate_expression|if (expression.length() >= sizeof(input_buffer_)) { strcpy(input_buffer_, expression.c_str()); }|writing beyond the bounds of input_buffer_ (1024 bytes) leads to stack corruption, application crashes, or arbitrary code execution.|user inputs an expression with length >= 1024 bytes.|invert the condition to check for < sizeof(input_buffer_) or use safe_string_copy/strncpy to safely truncate input.->stack buffer overflow via logic error in evaluate_expression|buffer overflow|cwe-120|critical|0.95|enhanced_calc.cpp|831|834|calculator::supercalc::evaluate_expression|if (expression.length() >= sizeof(input_buffer_)) { strcpy(input_buffer_, expression.c_str()); }|writing beyond the bounds of input_buffer_ (1024 bytes) leads to stack corruption, application crashes, or arbitrary code execution.|user inputs an expression with length >= 1024 bytes.|invert the condition to check for < sizeof(input_buffer_) or use safe_string_copy/strncpy to safely truncate input.

command injection in admin console|os command injection|cwe-78|critical|0.95|enhanced_calc.cpp|602|609|admin::adminconsole::execute_admin_command|if (command.substr(0, 4) == "exec") { std::string cmd = command.substr(5); std::cout << "executing: " << cmd << "\n"; system(cmd.c_str()); }|authenticated users can execute arbitrary os commands with the privileges of the running process, leading to full system compromise.|admin executes command starting with 'exec ' followed by malicious shell payload.|remove system() call. implement a strict allowlist of permitted commands or use safe process execution apis with argument vectorization.->command injection in admin console|os command injection|cwe-78|critical|0.95|enhanced_calc.cpp|602|609|admin::adminconsole::execute_admin_command|if (command.substr(0, 4) == "exec") { std::string cmd = command.substr(5); std::cout << "executing: " << cmd << "\n"; system(cmd.c_str()); }|authenticated users can execute arbitrary os commands with the privileges of the running process, leading to full system compromise.|admin executes command starting with 'exec ' followed by malicious shell payload.|remove system() call. implement a strict allowlist of permitted commands or use safe process execution apis with argument vectorization.
